[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *nalind* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fbuildah). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/release-1.27/OWNERS)~~ [nalind] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

/hold
We need to also bump containers/selinux to v1.10.2.  Late breaking news, I'll spin up a PR.
@nalind #4459 has merged, can you respin this please?
